message:
feat(syscall): add getrandom/alarm/uname/getrusage/renameat2/priority wrappers

Add raw syscall wrappers for:
- getrandom (get random bytes)
- alarm (signal timer, x86_64 only)
- uname (kernel info)
- getrusage (resource usage)
- renameat2 (rename with flags)
- getpriority, setpriority (scheduling priority)

Also migrate fallocate in unistd_abi to use native syscall.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
